'''gahongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactability|reactability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactability|reactability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gahongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhengeth|gæhengeth]] || [[word:gæhengej|gæhengej]] || [[word:gæhengesh|gæhengesh]] || [[word:gæhenge|gæhenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahohongoth|gahohongoth]] || [[word:gahohongoj|gahohongoj]] || [[word:gahohongosh|gahohongosh]] || [[word:gahohongo|gahohongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahongoth|gahongoth]] || [[word:gahongoj|gahongoj]] || [[word:gahongosh|gahongosh]] || [[word:gahongo|gahongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahofngoth|gahofngoth]] || [[word:gahofngoj|gahofngoj]] || [[word:gahofngosh|gahofngosh]] || [[word:gahofngof|gahofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahongotho|gahongotho]] || [[word:gahongojo|gahongojo]] || [[word:gahongosho|gahongosho]] || [[word:gahongoko|gahongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahongoth|gahongoth]] || [[word:gahongoj|gahongoj]] || [[word:gahongosh|gahongosh]] || [[word:gahongo|gahongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahongothol|gahongothol]] || [[word:gahongojol|gahongojol]] || [[word:gahongoshol|gahongoshol]] || [[word:gahongokol|gahongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahongothotho|gahongothotho]] || [[word:gahongojojo|gahongojojo]] || [[word:gahongoshosho|gahongoshosho]] || [[word:gahongoko|gahongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahongothon|gahongothon]] || [[word:gahongojon|gahongojon]] || [[word:gahongoshon|gahongoshon]] || [[word:gahongokon|gahongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahongothoro|gahongothoro]] || [[word:gahongojoro|gahongojoro]] || [[word:gahongoshoro|gahongoshoro]] || [[word:gahongokoro|gahongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
